finding_summary: Architecture docs describe a superseded local-model boundary.
public_disposition: Use the current claims-matrix architecture only; keep classifier fallback separate from reranking.

finding_summary: A displayed current-evaluation bullet contains deterministic stub metrics.
public_disposition: Label those values as stub; use the separately sourced funded-live table for live results.

finding_summary: Aggregate-pass wording omits the strict all-trials residual.
public_disposition: Pair live aggregate gates with 30/44 strict flagged scenarios and stub gates with 15/44.

finding_summary: Funded Phase-L raw reports are archive-only rather than tracked source files.
public_disposition: Cite the verified handoff archive hash; do not imply the raw report is in the source repository.

finding_summary: Cost material combines measured, estimated, projected, and modeled evidence.
public_disposition: Preserve the evidence class and 2026-07-08 pre-migration date on every row.

finding_summary: Workstation-selected live models differ from tracked defaults.
A component description presents an older database lifecycle as current.
public_disposition: Describe the database generically; do not claim a local W5 reproduction.

finding_summary: A model-call estimate conflicts with the dated measured trace.
public_disposition: Separate model-capable stages from observed calls; keep any comparator modeled.
Do not expose setup variables in this asset-only package.

finding_summary: Threshold headroom and runtime text omit deterministic-stub and workstation context.
public_disposition: Keep mode and environment boundaries adjacent to those values.

finding_summary: Test chronology can be misread as a post-migration full-suite run.
public_disposition: State 99 full-suite tests before Phase L plus 19 focused Phase-L tests only.

finding_summary: Interview material treats stub proxy accounting and modeled comparisons too strongly.
public_disposition: Exclude proxy spend and unsupported multipliers; retain modeled labels.

finding_summary: Chronological migration notes contain resolved intermediate states.
public_disposition: Keep them private and do not present them as current blockers.
